title: Roles
description: Manage application roles and their permissions.

table.title: Role list
table.description: Select a role to inspect or update it.

detail.title: Role details
detail.helper: Select a role to view its metadata and permissions.
detail.noPermissions: This role has no permissions yet.
detail.assignedUsersDescription: Users who have this role assigned
detail.noAssignedUsers: No users have been assigned to this role yet.

createRole.title: Create role
createRole.description: Define a new role and assign permissions.

name.label: Role name
name.helper: Use lowercase names; underscores are allowed.

guard.label: Guard
guard.helper: Leave empty to use the default guard.

permissions.label: Permissions
permissions.helper: Select permissions to assign to this role.

editRole.title: Edit role
editRole.description: Update the role details and permissions.

name.label: Role name
name.helper: Renaming protected roles is not allowed.

guard.label: Guard
guard.helper: Leave empty to keep the current guard.

permissions.label: Permissions
permissions.helper: Update the permissions assigned to this role.

deleteRole.title: Delete role
deleteRole.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{role}}? This action cannot be undone.
